2604.24374.title: MIPIC: Matryoshka Representation Learning via Self-Distilled Intra-Relational and Progressive Information Chaining
2604.24374.paper_summary: Representation learning is fundamental to NLP, but building embeddings that work well at different computational budgets is challenging. Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL) offers a flexible inference paradigm through nested embeddings; however, learning such structures requires explicit coordination of how information is arranged across embedding dimensionality and model depth. In this work, we propose MIPIC (Matryoshka Representation Learning via Self-Distilled Intra-Relational Alignment and Progressive Information Chaining), a unified training framework designed to produce structurally coherent and semantically compact Matryoshka representations. MIPIC promotes cross-dimensional structural consistency through Self-Distilled Intra-Relational Alignment (SIA), which aligns token-level geometric and attention-driven relations between full and truncated representations using top-k CKA self-distillation. Complementarily, it enables depth-wise semantic consolidation via Progressive Information Chaining (PIC), a scaffolded alignment strategy that incrementally transfers mature task semantics from deeper layers into earlier layers. Extensive experiments on STS, NLI, and classification benchmarks (spanning models from TinyBERT to BGEM3, Qwen3) demonstrate that MIPIC yields Matryoshka representations that are highly competitive across all capacities, with significant performance advantages observed under extreme low-dimensional.
2604.24374.paper_summary_zh: 表示學習是自然語言處理的基礎，但在不同計算預算下構建有效的嵌入是具有挑戰性的。馬特ryoshka表示學習（MRL）通過嵌套嵌入提供了一種靈活的推理範式；然而，學習這種結構需要明確協調信息在嵌入維度和模型深度之間的排列方式。在本研究中，我們提出了MIPIC（通過自我蒸餾的內部關係對齊和漸進信息鏈接的馬特ryoshka表示學習），這是一個統一的訓練框架，旨在產生結構一致且語義緊湊的馬特ryoshka表示。MIPIC通過自我蒸餾的內部關係對齊（SIA）促進跨維度的結構一致性，該方法使用top-k CKA自我蒸餾對完整和截斷表示之間的標記級幾何和注意力驅動關係進行對齊。作為補充，它通過漸進信息鏈接（PIC）實現深度語義整合，這是一種逐步對齊策略，將成熟的任務語義從更深層次逐步轉移到較早的層次。對於STS、NLI和分類基準的廣泛實驗（涵蓋從TinyBERT到BGEM3、Qwen3的模型）表明，MIPIC產生的馬特ryoshka表示在所有能力上都具有高度競爭力，在極端低維度下觀察到顯著的性能優勢。
2604.24374.author: Phung Gia Huy et.al.
2604.24374.authors: Phung Gia Huy, Hai An Vu, Minh-Phuc Truong, Thang Duc Tran, Linh Ngo Van, Thanh Hong Nguyen, Trung Le
